GlobalCoffeeBoard
Dashboard Knowledge Calculator For You Admin
Admin panel

Daily price entry

Enter today's figures — especially the Coffee Board of India grades. These become the dashboard's source of truth and override or fill in the live feed. Data is stored in your browser (localStorage).

Tip: open the Coffee Board of India Daily Market Report, copy today's grade prices into the table below, and click Save. Leave futures/FX blank to let the live feed provide them.

Benchmarks & FX (optional — leave blank for live feed)

Coffee Board of India — grade prices

Grade₹ / 50 kg

Note: this is a client-side panel for a static site. Data lives in this browser only. Use Export JSON to back up or move entries to another device, and Import JSON to restore them. For multi-user publishing, wire these values into a small Netlify Function or commit the JSON to your repo.
